Sports Center

Founded on October 12, 2020 and realized in a short time with the support of the Republic of Turkey Ministry of Youth and Sports and Spor Toto Organization Presidency, the Sports Center will serve the students, academics and administrative staff of the university as well as the people of the region. With a 215-seat tribune, the Sports Center includes an indoor basketball court, indoor astroturf field, indoor swimming pool, indoor tennis court, wrestling hall, fitness halls, archery area, squash, sauna, steam room and salt room, and has a total indoor area of 9,560 m2... The Sports Center, which is distinguished from its counterparts with its archery area, squash, sauna, steam room and salt room, promises its users a privileged and enjoyable sportive experience. With its 11,700 m2 landscape area, the Sports Center offers its users the opportunity to relax and do various activities in the greenery. In the Sports Center, every detail, including warming and changing rooms, vitamin bar, café, masjid and first aid room, has been meticulously considered and implemented.
